headline: Diplomatic Row Over 2,800 Deported Workers From Saudi
context: Saudi Arabia deported 2,800 Malaysian workers in December 2025 over visa violations straining bilateral relations.

cards.big: Saudi deported 2,800 Malaysian workers straining bilateral relations
cards.sub: Mass deportation left workers stranded without money or documents

cards.big: Embassy processed 2,800 emergency travel documents in 3 weeks
cards.sub: Consular staff worked 18-hour shifts to assist deportees at Jeddah airport

cards.big: 85% were on Umrah visas who overstayed to seek employment
cards.sub: Agencies in Malaysia facilitated scheme charging RM12,000 per worker

cards.big: Foreign Ministry summoned Saudi ambassador demanding investigation
cards.sub: Reports of physical mistreatment during detention prompted formal protest

cards.big: Deportation crisis tests whether labour migration protections extend to workers abroad
2,800 workers deported from Saudi in a diplomatic row. Worker protection starts before departure, not after crisis.
